channel.title: Software Engineering on Shdennlin Wiki
channel.description: Recent content in Software Engineering on Shdennlin Wiki

item.title: Network System Security
item.description: Network System Security SSL 研究Certbot : 自動更新SSL Ref: RHEL / CentOS 安裝 Certbot 取得及更新 Let’s Encrypt 憑證 萬用網域的SSL憑證 Ref: 如何使用 Certbot 命令列工具建立免費的 TLS/SSL 頂層網域憑證 憑證檔 This directory contains your keys and certificates. `privkey.pem` : the private key for your certificate. `fullchain.pem`: the certificate file used in most server software. `chain.pem` : used for OCSP stapling in Nginx >=1.3.7. `cert.pem` : will break many server configurations, and should not be used

item.title: Program Design
item.description: Program Design namespace 命名空間 - wiki 2.1.1. 匿名命名空間 - Google 開源專案風格指南(繁體中文版) HardCode JAVA java structure of web maven vs Gradle SpringBoot structure Familiar with object-oriented concepts(bring java book) Finish reading Java SE 6 技術手冊(8 or 11 up), SpringBoot API Web API 設計 Spring Boot-第2課-設計RESTful API 淺談 REST 軟體架構風格 (Part.I) - 從了解 REST 到設計 RESTful！ else 開源框架: Spring Gossip HTTP Status QA Q1. 為什麼在Service定義過了method, 在Repository還要定義一次?

item.title: System Engineering
item.description: Linux Linux目錄結構 為什麼伺服器要選擇 Linux 使用 SysRq 鍵讓當機的 Linux 安全地重新開機 Command man command describe Ref User adduser, addgroup add a user or group to the system –disabled-password chown chown -R <user>:<group> <folder_1> ... <folder_n> Chown User and Group Recursively How To Chown Recursively on Linux passwd groups print the groups a user is in sudo usermod -a -G <GROUP> <yourusername> Add your user to group gpasswd -d <user> <group> remote from userdel userdel [options] LOGIN delete a user account and related files (need to use sudo -) 移除 Linux 使用者 userdel -r <user> System lsof list open files sudo lsof -i -P -n \ grep LISTEN check if port is in use in sudo netstat -tupln \ grep LISTEN df report file system disk space usage df -h print sizes in powers of 1024 (e.

item.title: Tools
item.description: Tools ssh key build ssh-key 1 ssh-keygen -t rsa -f ~/.ssh/sslsend -C "sslsend" ssh config Location: ~/.ssh/config 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 Host alias-name # 用來連線的 alias 名稱 HostName server.name # host domain 或 ip Port port-number # host 的 SSH port IdentitiesOnly yes # 使用指定的 key IdentityFile ~/.ssh/private_ssh_file # 指定 pem 或 pub 的 key 路徑 User username-on-remote-machine # (選填)登入 SSH 的 username， # 只連 git 的話，可以不必要 ForwardX11 yes # (選填) 啟用回傳 GUI example:

item.title: Web Developer
item.description: Laravel - The PHP Framework for Web Artisans https://laravel.com/ Front-end Back-end Web Server Introduce https://medium.com/starbugs/web-server-nginx-1-cf5188459108 Nginx Nginx (pronounced “engine X”), stylized as NGINX, nginx or NginX, is a web server that can also be used as a reverse proxy, load balancer, mail proxy and HTTP cache. The software was created by Igor Sysoev and publicly released in 2004. Nginx is free and open-source software, released under the terms of the 2-clause BSD license.
